changes.before: The command hit Jaina like cold water.
changes.after: The command hit Jaina cold.

changes.before: "Something necromantic is moving north through them"
changes.after: "Necromantic taint is moving north through them"

changes.before: "I already knew something was wrong."
changes.after: "I already knew the lines were wrong."

changes.before: "Something is using the network of the land itself."
changes.after: "Someone is using the network of the land itself."

changes.before: "Like something dead refusing to stay dead."
changes.after: "Dead things should stay dead."

changes.before: "whatever started this was built to survive movement through preexisting magical infrastructure"
changes.after: "whatever started this was built to survive movement through older magical structure"

changes.before: Less like urgency. More like youthful arrogance with good boots.
changes.after: Less urgent. More like youthful arrogance with good boots.

changes.before: Because every patient explanation in every clean-lit chamber north of the pass had ended with caution, committee, one more day.
changes.after: Because every patient explanation north of the pass had ended with caution, committee, one more day.

changes.before: The staff's crystal tightened like a held breath once it came within reach
changes.after: The staff's crystal tightened at once when it came within reach

changes.before: Relief came first, hot and humiliating. Dread followed on its heels.
changes.after: Relief came first, hot and humiliating. Dread followed.

changes.before: Jaina inhaled. Started over.
changes.after: Jaina started over.

changes.before: Jaina exhaled through her nose.
changes.after: "Fine," Jaina said.

changes.before: the practical speed of people used to action following decision without a layer of ceremony in between
changes.after: Decision became motion.

changes.before: not generous, not trusting, simply efficient
changes.after: efficient, nothing more

changes.before: Jaina felt the barrier loosen before she saw it go.
changes.after: Jaina sensed the barrier loosen before she saw it go.

changes.before: A fourth ranger mounted last, unnamed, already forgettable except for the ease of her seat.
changes.after: A fourth ranger mounted last, unnamed and forgettable except for the ease of her seat.

changes.before: more like the shape of safety pressed into the land
changes.after: safety pressed into the land

changes.before: the clean geometry of elven stone
changes.after: the clean work of elven stone

changes.before: "The contamination is taking hold inside living systems."
changes.after: "Water takes it. Root takes it. Anything drinking or feeding here takes some measure of it in."

changes.before: "There are concentrations, almost knots"
changes.after: "There are knots"

changes.before: "If something was built to move by current, it would reinforce there."
changes.after: "If this was built to move by current, it would reinforce there."

changes.before: "Then something will," Sylvanas said.
changes.after: "Then trouble will," Sylvanas said.

changes.before: head lolling at an angle that should have sent it to the ground long before now
changes.after: head lolling at an impossible angle

changes.before: Its breath came in bubbling snorts.
changes.after: It breathed in bubbling snorts.

changes.before: "Ground and water are carrying the agent. Animals take it in. Once enough accumulates in blood and organ tissue... This is a regional lethal event."
changes.after: "Ground and water are carrying it. Animals take it in. Once enough builds in blood and organs... We are past strange disturbance."

changes.before: It came out instead as a short frayed breath.
changes.after: It came out instead as a rough sound.

changes.before: The whole place sat under the sky like a held breath gone too long.
changes.after: The whole place sat under the sky, breathless too long.

flags: Canon check passed: Jaina and Antonidas, Sylvanas's Ranger-General role, Andorhal, and Dalaran/Kirin Tor references matched Warcraft lore.
Kept Jaina's technical slip and self-correction in the opening interrogation; that beat is character work, not leftover document voice.
Kept Sylvanas's clipped dry humor even where a shorter line was possible.
